Description: If this record should be considered soft deleted; all columns excluding primary keys will be NULL if TRUE
Unique identifier for the referral observation record
Date and time when the observation became clinically effective
Date that the referral was made
Date that the referral was ended, e.g. when the patient was seen or the referral was cancelled
Unique identifier for the linked consultation for this observation entry
EMIS code ID  representing the consultation purpose; used for categorisation
The urgency of the referral (0, 1, 2, 3, 4 or NULL)
The human readable description of the urgency ('Routine', 'Soon', 'Urgent', 'Dated' or '2 Week Wait')
The direction of the referral ('in' or 'out')
EMIS code ID representing the service type, e.g. 1775591000006112 - Referred to School Nursing Service
The decription for how the referral was made (e.g. 'Telephone', 'NHS e-Referral', 'Verbal', etc.)
The organisation that this data was replicated from
Date and time the data was made available in the model with a relevant change
Date and time the model last updated this record
